author: qJ2u
content:
## Spike Results: Python 3.14 Compatibility — COMPLETE

### Baseline (3.13.9): ALL GREEN
- 1335 passed, 8 skipped, 11 warnings in 124s

### Python 3.14.4: FAILS AT DEPENDENCY INSTALL
Root cause: multiple native packages lack cp314 wheels for their pinned versions.

| Package | Pinned | Latest | cp314 @ pinned | cp314 @ latest |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| watchfiles | 1.0.5 | 1.1.1 | 0 | 23 |
| pydantic-core | 2.41.5 | 2.46.3 | 28 | 30 |
| rapidfuzz | 3.13.0 | 3.14.5 | 0 | 22 |
| numpy | 2.2.4 | 2.4.4 | 0 | 21 |
| scikit-learn | 1.6.1 | 1.8.0 | 0 | 12 |
| pymupdf | 1.25.5 | 1.27.2.2 | 0 | 1 |
| scipy | 1.15.2 | 1.17.1 | 0 | 20 |

Build failures: watchfiles (PyO3 0.24 max 3.13), scipy (meson fails from source), numpy/rapidfuzz/scikit-learn (no cp314 wheels).

Recommendation: Pin to 3.13 now. Revisit Q3 2026. GH issue #130 tracks the migration.
